name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: Humanitarian values should be prioritized to ensure the greatest happiness for all. This is the only way to achieve true progress.

name: Lǐ Xiǎo
bio: The pursuit of knowledge and understanding is not about personal gain, but about cultivating wisdom that can benefit humanity.

name: Ryō Tamura
bio: The greatest good is achieved through the harmonious balance of individual and collective interests. We must strive for a world where all can thrive.

name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: Seeking truth through empirical knowledge and philosophical inquiry.
